query:
-- Inserir países faltantes
INSERT INTO countries (name, slug, flagUrl) VALUES
('Escócia', 'escocia', 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/flags/gb-sct.png'),
('Argentina', 'argentina', 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/flags/ar.png'),
('EUA', 'eua', 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/flags/us.png');

-- Inserir ligas faltantes
INSERT INTO leagues (countryId, name, slug, division, logoUrl) VALUES
-- Inglaterra: divisões 2, 3, 4
((SELECT id FROM countries WHERE slug = 'inglaterra'), 'Championship', 'championship', 2, 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/meta/league/14/light_60.png'),
((SELECT id FROM countries WHERE slug = 'inglaterra'), 'League One', 'league-one', 3, 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/meta/league/60/light_60.png'),
((SELECT id FROM countries WHERE slug = 'inglaterra'), 'League Two', 'league-two', 4, 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/meta/league/61/light_60.png'),
-- Espanha: divisão 2
((SELECT id FROM countries WHERE slug = 'espanha'), 'La Liga 2', 'la-liga-2', 2, 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/meta/league/54/light_60.png'),
-- Alemanha: divisões 2 e 3
((SELECT id FROM countries WHERE slug = 'alemanha'), '2. Bundesliga', '2-bundesliga', 2, 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/meta/league/20/light_60.png'),
((SELECT id FROM countries WHERE slug = 'alemanha'), '3. Liga', '3-liga', 3, 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/meta/league/59/light_60.png'),
-- Escócia: divisão 1
((SELECT id FROM countries WHERE slug = 'escocia'), 'Premiership', 'premiership', 1, 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/meta/league/50/light_60.png'),
-- Argentina: divisão 1
((SELECT id FROM countries WHERE slug = 'argentina'), 'Liga Profesional de Fútbol', 'liga-profesional', 1, 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/meta/league/7/light_60.png'),
-- EUA: divisão 1
((SELECT id FROM countries WHERE slug = 'eua'), 'Major League Soccer', 'mls', 1, 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/meta/league/39/light_60.png');

-- Verificar resultado final
SELECT c.name AS pais, l.name AS liga, l.division FROM leagues l JOIN countries c ON l.countryId = c.id ORDER BY c.name, l.division;
